cards.title: Google's AI Search Reshapes SEO Strategy
cards.body: Google I/O made AI-generated answers front and center in search results, replacing traditional blue links. Brands now have minimal visibility into how AI describes them to customers, fundamentally changing years of established SEO strategies.

cards.title: Meta Launches Subscription Plans Across Platforms
cards.body: Meta is rolling out paid subscriptions for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally. The rollout includes new AI, creator, and business offerings under the 'Meta One' subscription brand.

cards.title: Cognition Raises $1B, Doubles Valuation
cards.body: AI coding startup Cognition reached a $25B pre-money valuation with $1B in funding. The company more than doubled its valuation in eight months while hitting $492M annualized revenue run rate.

cards.title: ElevenLabs Launches Mid-Track Genre Switching
cards.body: ElevenLabs released a new music-generation model allowing users to regenerate song sections independently. The feature lets creators switch genres mid-track without affecting other parts of the song.

cards.title: YouTube Auto-Labels AI-Generated Videos
cards.body: YouTube now automatically detects and labels videos using significant photorealistic AI generation. The platform is making AI labels more prominent and reducing reliance on creator disclosure.

cards.title: Robinhood Enables AI Trading Agents
cards.body: Robinhood now allows users to create separate accounts for AI agents to execute stock trades. Users can pre-load account balances for autonomous trading by their AI agents.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Installs Surge 30% Post-Google
cards.body: DuckDuckGo app installs jumped 30% as users reject Google's AI-driven search overhaul. Google replaced blue links with AI agents at I/O 2026, triggering swift user backlash.

cards.title: OpenRouter Doubles Valuation to $1.3B
cards.body: OpenRouter raised $113M Series B from CapitalG, doubling its valuation in one year. The multi-model AI platform saw 5x usage growth in six months, signaling the multi-AI future.

cards.title: UMG and TikTok Renew AI Music Protection
cards.body: Universal Music Group and TikTok renewed their agreement to combat unauthorized AI music. UMG continues pushing platforms and AI companies for stricter content moderation policies.

cards.title: ClickUp Replaces 100s of Employees with AI
cards.body: ClickUp is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents across the platform. The move signals shifting workforce dynamics in productivity software.

cards.title: China Retains AI Talent, Reduces Brain Drain
cards.body: China's booming AI sector is producing world-class talent that Beijing increasingly keeps domestic. The nation is reluctant to let top AI researchers emigrate.

cards.title: ClickHouse Triples Revenue to $250M
cards.body: Database provider ClickHouse tripled annualized revenue to $250M and is charting toward IPO. The company expects a public debut within the next few years.

cards.title: SOND Exits Stealth with Sleep Tech
cards.body: Bose's former head of sleep launched SOND with $7M funding and Dreambuds headphones. The closed-loop in-ear system captures 12 physiological signals and acts on them in real-time.

cards.title: Pope Critiques AI, Concentrated Power
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose systemic problems. The document addresses concentrated power, eroding democracy, and tech elite dominance.

cards.title: Human Archive Trains Robots with Gig Workers
cards.body: Human Archive, founded by UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers, pays Indian gig workers to collect robot training data. Workers wear camera-equipped caps and sensors for real-world physical data.

cards.title: Google's AI Search Replaces Blue Links with Agents
cards.body: Google I/O made official that AI-generated answers now dominate search results, shifting visibility away from traditional websites. Brands have almost no visibility into how AI describes them to customers, forcing SEO strategy overhauls.

cards.title: AI Coding Startup Cognition Reaches $25B Valuation
cards.body: Cognition hit $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, more than doubling its valuation in eight months. The AI coding platform's rapid growth signals strong enterprise demand for AI development tools.

cards.title: ElevenLabs Music AI Can Switch Genres Mid-Track
cards.body: ElevenLabs' new music-generation model lets users regenerate song sections without affecting the rest of the track. The feature enables more granular control over AI-generated music creation.

cards.title: YouTube Automatically Labels AI-Generated Videos
cards.body: YouTube will now automatically detect and label videos using significant photorealistic AI instead of relying solely on creator disclosure. The labels are also being made more prominent to users.

cards.title: Robinhood Lets AI Agents Trade Stocks Autonomously
cards.body: Robinhood now allows users to create separate accounts with pre-loaded balances for AI agents to trade automatically. The move expands autonomous AI into retail investing.

cards.title: Tech CEOs Suffering from AI Psychosis, Says CEO
cards.body: Box CEO Aaron Levie argues that tech leaders are uniquely prone to "AI psychosis," exhibiting almost religious belief in AI productivity gains. The comment highlights potential overestimation of AI capabilities.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Installs Spike 30% as Google AI Backlash
cards.body: Google's AI Search overhaul at I/O 2026 triggered swift backlash, with DuckDuckGo app installs jumping 30%. Users are actively seeking alternatives to avoid Google's AI-dominated search experience.

cards.title: OpenRouter Doubles Valuation to $1.3B in Year
cards.body: OpenRouter raised $113 million Series B led by CapitalG, with 5x usage growth over six months. The multi-AI-model platform reflects industry shift toward flexible, model-agnostic AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Startup Uses India Gig Workers to Train AI Robots
cards.body: Human Archive, founded by UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers, pays gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps collecting real-world training data for AI and robotics. The approach addresses critical shortage of physical training data.

cards.title: UMG and TikTok Renew Deal to Combat AI Music Abuse
cards.body: Universal Music Group and TikTok renewed their agreement to implement stricter content moderation against unauthorized AI-generated music. UMG has been pushing platforms and AI companies to enforce stronger protections.

cards.title: ClickUp Replaces Hundreds of Workers with AI Agents
cards.body: ClickUp is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents, signaling a shift in how software companies staff operations. The nine-year-old startup's move highlights growing enterprise adoption of autonomous AI.

cards.title: Pope's AI Encyclical Critiques Concentrated Tech Power
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose concentrated power and eroding democracy shaped by tech elites. The religious document highlights growing concerns about AI's influence on society.

cards.title: Organizations Want Agentic AI but Lack Infrastructure
cards.body: 85% of organizations want to be agentic within three years, but 76% say current operations can't support that change. A critical gap exists between AI ambitions and operational readiness.

cards.title: AI Jobs Hysteria Lacks Evidence of Mass Unemployment
cards.body: Despite fears that AI will devastate white-collar jobs, aggregate employment in developed countries remains stable with limited AI impact on headline numbers. The reality contradicts widespread panic about technological unemployment.

cards.title: Entry-Level Work Crisis May Hide Behind AI Stability
cards.body: While overall employment remains stable, a troubling change is emerging in entry-level opportunities as AI advances. The shift could create disparate impacts across different worker categories.

cards.title: Google DeepMind CEO: AI Standing in Singularity Foothills
cards.body: Demis Hassabis declared at Google I/O that AI has reached the "foothills of the singularity," where AI begins rapidly exceeding human intelligence. The statement signals Google's confidence in imminent AI breakthroughs.

cards.title: AI Companies Build World Models to Overcome LLM Limits
cards.body: AI companies are developing world models to help systems understand external environments beyond LLM text capabilities. Recent advances in world models signal a shift in AI architecture priorities.

cards.title: Critical Vulnerability Imperils Millions of AI Agents
cards.body: A critical vulnerability discovered in an open source package threatens millions of deployed AI agents. The security flaw highlights infrastructure risks in rapidly scaling AI systems.
